name: @buildtovalue/replay
description: Headless conformance-checking for BPMN replay (Handoff 7B): streaming XES 2.0 / CSV parsing, one-pass frequency/time pre-aggregation, token-replay fitness with deviation detection, and variant extraction — all over an ABSTRACT injected graph {nodes, edges}. Imports NOTHING from the ecosystem (not even @buildtovalue/core). Zero dependencies.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node ../../scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs dist/cjs
